name: flutter_devtools_mcp
description: MCP server for Flutter UI automation via VM Service extensions. Connect to running Flutter debug apps — inspect the widget tree, tap, scroll, type, screenshot, and more.

tools.name: connect
tools.description: Connect to a running Flutter debug app. Pass vmServiceUrl (the http:// URL from flutter run output), or omit to auto-discover via mDNS then port scan.

tools.name: discover
tools.description: Find running Flutter debug apps via mDNS + port scan. If none found, paste the VM Service URL from flutter run output into any tool.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Check MCP connection status. Returns whether connected and how many Flutter debug VMs are detectable.

tools.name: launch
tools.description: Launch a Flutter app in debug mode — starts flutter run as subprocess and auto-connects. Auto-discovers VM service after build.

tools.name: launch_status
tools.description: Check status of the most recently launched app process.

tools.name: stop_app
tools.description: Stop a running app launched via the launch tool.

tools.name: widget_tree
tools.description: Get the current widget tree as structured JSON — every widget, type, label, key, bounds, children. Pass vmServiceUrl if auto-discover fails.

tools.name: inspect
tools.description: Get detailed properties of a specific widget node by its ID (from widget_tree). Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: get_parent_chain
tools.description: Get ancestor chain from a widget node up to root. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: get_render_tree
tools.description: Dump the render object tree as text (layout, constraints, sizes). Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: get_layer_tree
tools.description: Dump the compositing layer tree — diagnose saveLayer/opacity overhead. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: dump_semantics
tools.description: Dump the accessibility/semantics tree in traversal order. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: tap
tools.description: Tap a widget by selector (semantics:, key:, text:, index:). Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Focus a text field by selector then enter text. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: scroll
tools.description: Scroll a scrollable widget in a direction. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: press_back
tools.description: Pop the top route from the navigator stack. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture screen as PNG image. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: hot_reload
tools.description: Trigger hot reload on the connected app. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: hot_restart
tools.description: Trigger full hot restart (reassemble). Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate a Dart expression in the running app. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: get_errors
tools.description: Get Flutter framework errors from the running app. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: get_logs
tools.description: Capture recent app output (stdout, stderr, log()). Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: get_memory
tools.description: Get memory usage of the app's main isolate (heap, external). Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: toggle_dark_mode
tools.description: Toggle between light and dark mode. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: toggle_platform
tools.description: Override target platform. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: toggle_debug_paint
tools.description: Toggle widget boundary overlay. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: toggle_repaint_rainbow
tools.description: Toggle repaint rainbow overlay. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: toggle_slow_animations
tools.description: Slow down or restore animation speed (1.0=normal). Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: toggle_performance_overlay
tools.description: Toggle frame timing graphs. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: track_rebuilds
tools.description: Toggle widget rebuild tracking. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.

tools.name: track_repaints
tools.description: Toggle repaint tracking. Pass vmServiceUrl if needed.
